title: The Void
excerpt: The dark had thickened to something that his headlamp could not penetrate.

title: Mayfly Season
excerpt: Every year they came back. Every year there were more of them.

title: The Snare
excerpt: He had set the trap three weeks ago and had not gone back to check it.

title: Blighthouse
excerpt: The light still worked. That was the part no one could explain.

title: What Stays Behind
excerpt: The house remembered everyone who had ever lived in it. That was the problem.
